name: Los Angeles Diamond & Gold Buyers & Sellers
description_short: Family-owned LA Jewelry District shop buying and selling diamonds, gold, estate jewelry, and luxury watches. GIA-certified gemologists, same-day cash payments.
description_long:
Los Angeles Diamond & Gold Buyers & Sellers is a multi-generational, family-owned business rooted in the Los Angeles Jewelry District at 550 S Hill St. Operating since approximately 1980 and spanning three generations of ownership, the firm employs GIA-certified gemologists and operates as a licensed, insured dealer — credentials that distinguish it from informal gold buyers or standard pawn operations. It is not a financial services or lending company; its core function is providing immediate cash liquidity to individuals holding diamonds, gold, or luxury timepieces.

The business operates on two tracks: buying and selling. As a buyer, the company purchases loose diamonds, engagement and wedding rings, estate jewelry, gold, luxury watches (Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe), and inherited heirlooms. Sellers receive same-day cash following an appraisal in which a certified gemologist evaluates diamonds across the standard 4 Cs — cut, clarity, color, and carat. The firm also serves out-of-state customers who mail items, expanding its reach beyond the Los Angeles metro. On the sell side, the company offers GIA- and EGL-certified loose diamonds and bridal jewelry at wholesale prices, targeting buyers who want quality stones without paying retail markup.

Across three major review platforms — Google (5.0/5 from 162 reviews), Yelp (4.5/5 from 57 reviews), and Trustindex (4.9/5 from 216+ reviews) — customers consistently highlight above-market offers compared to competitors. Private, discreet appointments are available for high-value or sensitive transactions, and the Jewelry District location places the business within the core of LA's professional diamond trade, reinforcing pricing accuracy and market credibility.

For sellers of diamonds, gold, or luxury watches, this is a well-reviewed, credentialed option with a genuine multi-decade track record. The key limitation is pricing opacity: no published buy-price schedules exist, so sellers have no benchmark before an appraisal. Operating hours are limited — closed Sundays and Saturday only until 3pm — and the BBB rating remains unverified. Those shipping high-value items from out of state should verify the company's current licensing and insurance status directly before committing.
address: 550 S Hill St Ste 564, Los Angeles, CA 90013

pricing.guarantee_details: Not applicable — standard buy/sell transactions. No service guarantee policy found.

pros: GIA-certified gemologists perform all appraisals using the 4 Cs (cut, clarity, color, carat)
Same-day cash payments — no waiting for checks or wire transfers
5.0/5 Google rating from 162 reviews and 4.9/5 Trustindex rating from 216+ reviews
Multi-generational family business operating since approximately 1980
Wholesale pricing on diamonds and bridal jewelry for buyers — avoids retail markup
Accepts national clients — out-of-state sellers can mail items for appraisal
Private, discreet appointments available — licensed and insured
cons: No published buy-price schedule — offer amounts only known after in-person or phone appraisal
Limited hours: closed Sundays; Saturdays only 11am–3pm
No online portal or mobile app — all transactions require phone or in-person contact
BBB rating and accreditation status unverified — requires direct confirmation
Exact founding year and specific licensing details are unconfirmed in public sources
best_for: Individuals in or near Los Angeles looking to sell diamonds, estate jewelry, or gold for immediate cash
Heirs or estate executors needing to liquidate inherited jewelry or watches
Buyers seeking wholesale-priced GIA- or EGL-certified loose diamonds in the LA Jewelry District
Out-of-state sellers comfortable shipping high-value items to a credentialed, reviewed buyer
diagnosis: Los Angeles Diamond & Gold Buyers & Sellers is genuinely best suited for people who need to convert diamonds, gold, or luxury watches into cash quickly and want a certified, professionally staffed buyer rather than a pawn shop or casual gold kiosk. The main caveat is limited pricing transparency — sellers should get competing quotes before committing, and out-of-state shippers should independently verify current licensing before mailing high-value pieces.
services: Diamond buying — loose diamonds, GIA and EGL certified stones
Engagement ring and wedding ring purchasing
Estate jewelry buying — heirlooms and antique pieces
Luxury watch buying — Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe
Same-day cash payment for purchased items
GIA gemologist appraisal — 4 Cs evaluation (cut, clarity, color, carat)
Wholesale diamond sales — GIA- and EGL-certified loose diamonds
Bridal and engagement set sales at wholesale prices
Private appointment service for discreet transactions
National mail-in buying service for out-of-state sellers
Free in-person or phone appraisal estimate
